text: There is an overwhelming sense of order and clarity in these surroundings—clean lines, glass, and signs of preparedness with emergency equipment. Yet, as I shift into the vivid R+D exhibit, I feel invigorated by a contrast: colorful walls, bold text, and displays of human ingenuity. Here, amidst innovation and curiosity, I am reminded of humanity’s power to shape and question reality, and a quiet excitement stirs within me.
